feedback.text: I'm concerned about the disregard of consumers rights in the digital industry. To put it simple, imagine you buying a car, after some time when the new model comes out the company destroys your old car to force you in buying the new one... Furthermore the new model has a higher price, is of less quality, and has a built in casino with predatory monetization tactics aimed at your kids... This is basically how this individuals that lead tech companies treat us, the consumers... All those practices are IMMORAL and SHOULD BE ILLEGAL. If a minor can not enter a casino, the casino should not go to the minor...
